programme.title: Dialogue

programme.title: TOP MODELS
programme.desc: Meet this season’s modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: Rangers of the Rails
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: The Big Sleepover
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: Decorating Donkey
programme.desc: Sarah plans a surprise for when her hibernating tortoise wakes up.

programme.title: Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout "DING DONG" when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: I'm Not Even Scared of Nothing
programme.desc: Werewolves, cobras, alligators, and commando dragons! The animals chat about all the things which absolutely do not make them scared.

programme.title: It's Time for Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: Show and Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: The Party Badge
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Tulip Fields, Netherlands
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.title: Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song "We're Chilli When It's Hot"

programme.title: Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song "All My Friends" to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: Carrot Powers Up
programme.desc: Carrot wants to become super strong, so she restores Evil Pea's robot suit for herself.

programme.title: Evil Pea's Veggie Vision
programme.desc: Evil Pea is tricked by lots of Supertatoes who appear all over the supermarket.

programme.title: Noise
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Pizza
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pizza' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of pizza - a round pizza, a tomato pizza, a party pizza and a cheesy pizza!

programme.title: Messy's Missing Treasure
programme.desc: Mayor Oki wants to dress to impress the visiting mayor by wearing a gemstone-encrusted chain.

programme.title: Cheesy Bang Bang
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Song of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Climate Change, The Arctic Ocean
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are watching for polar bears, but an iceberg is heading for their ship!

programme.title: Chickenrat
programme.desc: It's bedtime and Bingo can't remember where she left her beloved Floppy. Retracing their steps, Bingo and Bluey lead their Mum through their bizarre day in the hope of tracking her down.

programme.title: Baby Race
programme.desc: Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first.

programme.title: Pass the Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Andy and the Baby Humpback Whale
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Pacific ocean, off the tropical islands of Hawaii, on a baby animal mission to see how a baby humpback whale prepares for its 5000 km migration North to the rich feeding grounds of Alaska.

programme.title: Snail
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.title: The Shadow Badge
programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: The Collecting Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Everglades National Park, Florida
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: Lorenzo's Solo
programme.desc: Lorenzo decides to play a dangerous trick on his loyal coach Beppe.

programme.title: Paisley Sea
programme.desc: The duo think they are heading to the zoo, but the bus takes a surprising diversion.

programme.title: Duck Hotel
programme.desc: Duck wins a trip for two to a rather exciting hotel, and he finds that he settles in much quicker than Sarah.

programme.title: Buttons
programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

programme.title: Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: I Would Fly All The Way Around The World
programme.desc: Invisibility, speed, electricity, and flight, the animals share all the exciting things they would do if they had magic powers.

programme.title: It's time to post a picture
programme.desc: JoJo has drawn a picture to show Great Gran Gran over a video call, but just as she's about to show it, the internet goes down!

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: The Sailing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick.

programme.title: The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Himalayan Heroes, Nepal
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy "Cauliflower Creak" song.

programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: The Sailing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick.

programme.title: The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Himalayan Heroes, Nepal
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Cauliflower
programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy "Cauliflower Creak" song.

programme.title: Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song "We're Chilli When It's Hot"

programme.title: Evil Pea's Veggie Vision
programme.desc: Evil Pea is tricked by lots of Supertatoes who appear all over the supermarket.

programme.title: Come Back Cobs
programme.desc: The Cobs have finally had enough of Evil Pea's ungratefulness and team up with Supertato.

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 今日环球
programme.desc: 节目关注每日发生的国际新闻。

programme.title: 平凡匠心
programme.desc: 《平凡匠心》是一部系列人物纪录片。它以"平凡人，非凡梦"为主题，讲述精彩而极致的人生故事。

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 鲁健访谈
programme.desc: 作为一档30分钟的高端人物访谈栏目，《鲁健访谈》的选题方向为全球影响力人物（包括政治、经济、科技、体育、文化等领域）、海外杰出华人代表、国内各领域知名人士。

programme.title: 新闻联播
programme.desc: 《新闻联播》是中国中央电视台于1978年1月1日创办的综合性新闻节目，是国内外观众群最庞大、影响最广泛的电视新闻栏目。

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: Wife and expectant mother Lola seems to have it all: the big house, a dashing husband, and a thriving restaurant. But Lola's perfect life is interrupted when a ghost from the past suddenly shows up.

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: When Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair, she works to obtain proof before she can initiate a divorce rather than risk losing control of the charity they've built together.

programme.title: Encocado Shrimp with Poblano Stuffed Grits
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Baked Gnocchi & Jammy Olive Oil Cake
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Chicken Scarpariello With S.E. Cupp
programme.desc: Political commentator and Rachael's friend, S.E. Cupp joins Rachael in her upstate kitchen to learn how to prepare Chicken Scarpiello, a classic Italian American chicken dish that is baked and sauteed.

A French-themed Mystery Box in Bendigo has the contestants reaching for their finest French cooking skills to create 'magnifique' dishes. Who will rise to the occasion and avoid tomorrow's pressure test?

programme.title: Candace and Sean
programme.desc: Sean moved to the East Coast to be with Candace, but living in her bachelorette apartment is becoming cramped. They are searching for a seaside home that accommodates both of their needs.

programme.title: Tables of Terror
programme.desc: The restaurants in this episode might be a little scary, but they also serve up food that's scarily good! Join host Michael Yo on a visit to a Tokyo restaurant dedicated to vampires.
Five men set out on an eco-journey to Mongolia: leader Kim Seok-hoon, Kwon Yul, Lim Woo-il, Shin Jae-ha and nomad Shaun. With only backpacks, they have a shared mission to 'clean the Earth'.

programme.title: Little Girl In The Window
programme.desc: When amateur photographer Iris notices "HELP" scrawled on a dusty window in a picture she took of a house, she becomes increasingly convinced that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.
With the construction in full swing, the celebrity directors make a surprise visit to the site. But when they arrive, they find only the skeleton of Shin Dong's team's empty house.

The Dokbakz wake up to their first morning at the glamping site in true Dokbak fashion. They decide that the area next to the restroom will be the site for their second-day transportation dokbak game.

programme.title: Tampa: Wall Street
programme.desc: An overextended Dolmar and his team take on a botched flip. But when delays plague the timeline, he recruits his wife Keisha to help manage the project and sees dollar signs as local house prices soar.
Nat, Gillian, Alex and Lourdes battle it out in a Pressure Test at Black Cat Truffles. They have four hours to recreate truffle farm owner - and hatted chef - Liam Downes' signature dish.
Follow Jason Wang and learn about the White Snow Osmanthus Crab, a classic Taiwanese dish that marries theatricality with oceanic umami. Master Chef Kuo Hong-che demonstrates how it is made.

programme.title: Paella Macaroni
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: Balsamic & Soy Braised Brisket & Apple Honey Cake
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Tampa: Larkin
programme.desc: Dolmar gets a great deal on a zombie in the up-and-coming Spring Hill neighbourhood, but after a series of mistakes and expensive renovations this money maker quickly starts to look more like a money pit!

programme.title: Korean Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Korean fried chicken is one of John's favourite dishes. Rachael prepares this sweet and spicy meal at home and shows how to pair the dish with Persian cucumbers, daikon radishes and kimchi.
After a fun day, it's time to fill up! Before heading to the restaurant for their first meal in Singapore, the friends play the Dokbak game for the first-day transportation fee.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.desc: Dolmar gets a great deal on a zombie in the up-and-coming Spring Hill neighbourhood, but after a series of mistakes and expensive renovations this money maker quickly starts to look more like a money pit!

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TOLONG PERMAK HATIKU
programme.desc: A traveling seamstress specializing in clothing alterations meets a handsome man during a roadside incident. Though sparks fly instantly, their romance faces a major obstacle: the man is already committed to someone else.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Halumu dan Haluku Jadi Halufyu
programme.desc: Alya’s (Callista Arum) car is blocked by Thoriq’s (Kevin Hillers) wonton cart. While looking for her boyfriend, Ozi, Alya discovers a painful truth: Ozi has been dating another woman named Hana for three years. After a public breakup at Thoriq’s stall, Alya and Thoriq grow closer, sparking a jealous rage in Hana.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BUNGA CINTA BERSEMI DI BENGKEL
programme.desc: When Fery’s (Hardy Fadillah) delivery van breaks down, he ends up in a heated argument with a female mechanic named Nabila (Naomi Zaskia). Their parents, who are old friends, notice that their children's personalities don't match traditional gender roles. To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kasih Paham Bang Ilmu Bangun Rumah Tangga
programme.desc: After her sister’s passing, Jeny (Nabila Zavira) is forced to marry her brother-in-law, Ivan (Cemal Faruk). The two can't stand each other, but their families are determined to make it work, pushing them into a honeymoon and demanding they produce an heir as soon as possible.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: GURIH CINTA TELUR ASIN
programme.desc: Varrel (Dimaz Andrean) has been traumatized by salted eggs since childhood. After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Usia 2 Bulan Udah Jadi Apa? Jadi-an
programme.desc: Yogi’s (Ridho Illahi) life brightens up with the arrival of a new PE teacher, Wina (Nabila Zavira). He is captivated when she tells him, 'True strength doesn't just come from the body, but from a strong mind and heart.' However, Yogi’s admiration turns to heartbreak when he discovers Wina has given her heart to someone else.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona Cowok Starboy Adalah Maut
programme.desc: What started as a fake romance turns into real feelings for Kevin (Kevin Hillers) and Indah. His ex, Liyan (Elina Joerg), refuses to accept the breakup and conspires with Andre (Rexy Rizky) to sabotage their relationship and make Indah hate Kevin.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.desc: The 19th edition of the Indian Premier League once again bring together leading international and domestic cricketers in India’s premier T20 competition. The tournament will feature 10 teams competing in 74 matches.

programme.desc: SWAT teams up with the DEA to conduct a massive gang sweep, only to discover that a vicious cartel is planting roots in the city and endangering numerous lives; Hicks marks an important anniversary.

programme.title: Degargoony
programme.desc: A death in a tight-knit community reveals the holes in a flawed refugee system. Gordon and Peggy's plans for a romantic weekend go awry, when Jenny falls ill and must oversee a remote autopsy.

programme.desc: When a prominent Judge disappears, Charlie and Rex piece together the crime with the help of a blind true crime podcaster who insists she heard a murder but could not see the culprit.

programme.title: Out Of Pocket
programme.desc: Ahead of Bailey's return home, John looks for clues to locate Jason Wyler. Then, Tim and Lucy swap rookies; a friendly face resurfaces at the station, and Wesley feels unsettled over Angela.

programme.desc: Tess gives the day off to a sleep-deprived Sunny before getting pulled into a nail-biting 911 call with an injured man locked in a steel drum who has no idea where... or who he is! As Tess navigates motives of revenge and business rivalry in a race against time to uncover the location of the soon-to-be murder victim and save his life, Sunny tricks Kye and obtains his security code, obsessively monitoring her neighbours on the building's CCTV cameras, convinced she witnessed a murder.

programme.desc: BRAVO targets a factory in Myanmar that the DEA has tied to China and fentanyl production. Lieutenant Davis wants the team to pull intel and destroy the plant. Jason vies for a safer plan, and some on the team begin to question his decisions.

Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Family Matters
programme.desc: Tess is sent into a community skeptical of the police to discreetly investigate a local Church's potential links to human trafficking following the disappearance of the star soloist of the church's choir. As the girl's whole family comes under suspicion, Sunny brings some much needed perspective to the pressure put on many first generation kids by immigrant parents, helping Tess track the girl down in an unexpected location and uncover the dark truth behind her disappearance.

programme.title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Can Living Human Brain Cells Power AI?
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: The Big Business of Drilling Deep Into the Earth
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Willow Bay Sees Opportunity in Angel City FC
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with USC Annenberg School for Communication and Journalism Dean Willow Bay about her investment in Angel City Football Club and her tenure on "NBA Inside Stuff."

programme.title: From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck
programme.desc: Super Bowl winner and Goldman Sachs Managing Director Justin Tuck talks about the pressure of playing in New York and his transition from football to finance.

programme.title: How Magic Johnson Built a Business Empire
programme.desc: The hosts sit with Magic Johnson to discuss how he was able to make the transition from being a legendary basketball player to a successful businessman.

programme.title: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire
programme.desc: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire. Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones speaks on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fuelled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: How Emmanuel Acho Reinvents Himself
programme.desc: The hosts talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, "Speakeasy."

programme.title: Protect
programme.desc: Protect. How can we be optimistic in 2025? As Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: Rethink
programme.desc: Waste is a significant contributor to global warming, but turning it into a resource can help curb emissions and shrink humanity's environmental footprint.

programme.title: Invent
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: Energize
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: Ray Dalio, Founder of Bridgewater Associates
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: How to Run Your Family's $1.6 Trillion Empire
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: Theresa May and the Brutality of Politics
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: Inside Europe's Economic Crises With Christine Lagarde
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Ajay Banga on India, Migration and a Youth Jobs Time Bomb
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Super Intelligence
programme.desc: Artificial intelligence has begun to exhibit early signs of agency. Are we on a path to superintelligence? Self destruction? Or is the potential promise and threat of AI being overblown?

programme.title: Animal Communication
programme.desc: Bioacoustics technology and AI are revealing how animals communicate, and may soon allow us to talk to them. What can we learn from wildlife, and should we be talking to the animals at all?

programme.title: Quantum Computing
programme.desc: With the promise of unimaginable computing power, a global race for quantum supremacy is raging. Who will be first to harness this new technological force, and what will they do with it?

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: Water. Our survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking. Can technology help secure humanity's future water needs?

programme.title: Pain
programme.desc: For some, pain is excruciating and inescapable. But amid the continuing fallout of the opioid crisis, new technologies are being developed to limit and even eliminate pain.

programme.title: Next Billion
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online. How will these new users embrace this technology to transform their lives, and what will it mean for the rest of the world?

In 2025, Gómez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gómez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: PL Preview 2025/26 (Updated)
programme.desc: A tightly packed look-ahead to the forthcoming matchround with a mix of player interviews and special features.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: This is Sunderland’s first home league game against Nottingham Forest since a 1-0 defeat in September 2017, and first in the Premier League since a 1-1 draw in March 1997.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 14 of their last 15 Premier League games against Burnley (D1) since a 1-0 loss at Turf Moor in March 2015.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore André Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Tottenham have lost their last three away league games against Wolves, as many as they had in their previous 16 visits to Molineux (W10 D3).

programme.title: iPie
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: #PeezyB
programme.desc: Sam gets a job as the assistant to the huge rap star Peezy B. Cat finds babysitting much more challenging without Sam around to help.

programme.title: Bishop Makes Her Move
programme.desc: The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

programme.title: Night Of The Mechazoids
programme.desc: The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BIHSOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?

programme.title: Krusty Koncessionaires / Dream Hoppers
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell krabby patties in the stands. // SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners. // Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: One Better Day - Part 1 / One Better Day - Part 2
programme.desc: Bettervale is celebrating "Better Day" but Best and Bester manage to anger the townsfolk by causing mischief again. // After a period of exile Best and Bester return hoping to patch things up with their neighbours and with each other.

programme.title: Cactus Sitting / Disaster of Hole 2
programme.desc: The twins take a cactus called Pricklebutt to the beach and end up mounting a dramatic search and rescue mission. // Best and Bester won't let Grumpy Pants' round of golf stop them from catching the finale of their favourite show.

programme.title: Home Ecch! / Fun & Done!
programme.desc: Squidina hosts a television show to pass a home economics class. // Patrick and SpongeBob try to unlock a dull child's imagination.

programme.title: Little Patscals / The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: Jolly Lodgers / Biddy Sitting
programme.desc: Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel. // SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: Whirlybrains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad - flying your own brain like a tiny drone!

programme.title: Party All The Crime
programme.desc: After Chloe's birthday party is cancelled, Max and Phoebe compete to throw her a new one. When Max's time-stopping birthday gift falls into the wrong hands, he must work with Phoebe to stop some party poopers from ruining Chloe's birthday.

programme.title: Krampapalooza
programme.desc: Danger Force sees an opportunity to make money fast by hosting Swellview's hottest music festival, but they catch a case of the Kramps when Krampus threatens to ruin their plans.

programme.title: Captain Drex
programme.desc: Captain Man's old sidekick and nemesis, Drex, returns from the past with an army of cavemen to finish off Captain Man once and for all. Kid Danger may be the only one who can save Captain Man now.

programme.title: Prom-Com / Scene Steeler
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: Rough Patch / The GLOAT
programme.desc: To earn her next patch and become a golden Snickerdoodle, Lola must spend quality time with Sunset Canyon senior, Bernie. // After Lynn sees cousin Shiloh's athletic skills, she gets overly competitive to prove she's the greatest Loud of all time.

programme.title: Grub Snub
programme.desc: When Leni and her friends start hanging out at Gus's, Lincoln and the gang start a turf war for control.

programme.title: Single-Celled Defense / Buff for Puff
programme.desc: Sick of being stepped on, Plankton learns self-defense from Sandy. // Mr. Krabs steps out of his shell and into the gym after Larry shows him up at the beach.

programme.title: We Heart Hoops / SpongeChovy
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick discover that their favorite Kelpbed Kid is a familiar face. // It's invasion of the faux-chovies when everyone in Bikini Bottom suddenly starts meeping!

programme.title: The Sandman Cometh
programme.desc: When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.desc: Pat The Hapless goes on a barbaric quest to the shopping mall. // After Captain Quasar replaces Pat-Tron with a more efficient robot, Pat-Tron works for the Star family.

programme.desc: To help Lori out, Luan gets her a job at the Burnt Bean, where Luan is the boss. // Lana struggles to shake off Lily when she starts to follow Lana around like a shadow.

programme.desc: Upset that Phoebe has a new partner, Max decides to partner with his friend Gideon. But things backfire when Max tries to turn Gideon into a supersized superhero. Chloe's friends pretend to be wealthy so they can bond with her new crush.

programme.desc: When Dr. Minyak takes the Man Fans hostage, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to find a way to rescue them without Dr. Minyak seeing them move.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶等人混入禁军，试图在星瀚大典上刺杀彧修明，但被早有准备的彧修明困住。叶凌霜使用凌霄火焰通知翼无忧前来救援，最终成功帮助七海伶逃脱，但叶凌霜被捕。彧修明质问界诸婴并试探其对七海伶的感情。七海伶为救叶凌霜回大牢而被捕，界诸婴为其求情并被迫封印了七海伶的星辰力。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 十八年来，满月记恨着蒋家害她家破人亡，如今借公关工作令基俊回港。基俊认出满月遂刻意试探，满月为让基俊放下戒心，不惜以身犯险，制造车祸助他脱险。苦肉计成功令满月取得哲贤和基俊的信任，哲贤更命满月筹办基俊的婚礼；而满月则暗中将朱柏中安插在蒋家，成为基俊的司机。成风想向满月探问蒋家消息，满月反从成风口中得知，蒋家即将与「王卓集团」主席卓昊天的孙女卓慧云联婚。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Preview Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: For the good of the cause
programme.desc: One morning, two men hold up a butcher's lorry and steal its load of meat. Alex quickly finds the thieves: recently arrived in the region they are ready to do whatever it takes to help those in greatest need. Their plan is to strike increasing-ly harder.

programme.title: Geopolitis
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: La Volante
programme.desc: While he is taking his wife to hospital to give birth, Thomas hits and kills a young man on the road. The young man's mother Marie-France, is devastated. Nine years later, without revealing her identity, she becomes Thomas' secretary and gets more and more involved in his life.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶等人混入禁军，试图在星瀚大典上刺杀彧修明，但被早有准备的彧修明困住。叶凌霜使用凌霄火焰通知翼无忧前来救援，最终成功帮助七海伶逃脱，但叶凌霜被捕。彧修明质问界诸婴并试探其对七海伶的感情。七海伶为救叶凌霜回大牢而被捕，界诸婴为其求情并被迫封印了七海伶的星辰力。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 十八年来，满月记恨着蒋家害她家破人亡，如今借公关工作令基俊回港。基俊认出满月遂刻意试探，满月为让基俊放下戒心，不惜以身犯险，制造车祸助他脱险。苦肉计成功令满月取得哲贤和基俊的信任，哲贤更命满月筹办基俊的婚礼；而满月则暗中将朱柏中安插在蒋家，成为基俊的司机。成风想向满月探问蒋家消息，满月反从成风口中得知，蒋家即将与「王卓集团」主席卓昊天的孙女卓慧云联婚。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.desc: Another portrayal of the same heartfelt love journey, highlighting charm, humor, and the small emotional conflicts that slowly build into meaningful relationships.

programme.title: Election Night, Part I
programme.desc: News Night goes forward with its election-night coverage in what might be its last broadcast with Will and Mac.

programme.title: Trust
programme.desc: After a scandal, a Hollywood starlet retreats to a remote cabin - but betrayal by the man she trusted sparks a brutal game of survival.

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Iron Jawed Angels
programme.desc: Hilary Swank and Anjelica Huston star in this HBO Original Movie about the women's suffragette movement in 1920s America.

programme.title: Election Night, Part Ii
programme.desc: Season finale. Will and Charlie await an executive decision on the newsroom’s fate as the 2012 election winds down.

programme.title: Quad Gods
programme.desc: The world’s first all-quadriplegic e-sports team illustrates the power of human mettle and spirit.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: When a young African-American man visits his white girlfriend’s family estate, he becomes ensnared in the more sinister, real reason for the invitation.

programme.title: No Reservations
programme.desc: Catherine Zeta Jones stars as a chef with a fiery temper struggling to care for her orphan niece and manage the handsome new sous chef.

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Einstein And Eddington
programme.desc: A story about the unlikely partnership during World War I between a young British scientist named Arthur Eddington and the brilliant physicist, Albert Einstein.

programme.title: Angus, Thongs And Perfect Snogging
programme.desc: Eccentric but loveable 14 year-old Georgia Nicolson tries to overcome the trials and tribulations of growing up.

programme.title: In The Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: Cornhole
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs.

programme.title: Snag It
programme.desc: Detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clark’s affair with Carol - and Floyd’s dalliances on the DTF app.

programme.title: The Go Getter
programme.desc: Detective Plumb begins to suspect that Carol might be hiding key details about her affair. Clark sheds light on his friendship with Floyd.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶等人混入禁军，试图在星瀚大典上刺杀彧修明，但被早有准备的彧修明困住。叶凌霜使用凌霄火焰通知翼无忧前来救援，最终成功帮助七海伶逃脱，但叶凌霜被捕。彧修明质问界诸婴并试探其对七海伶的感情。七海伶为救叶凌霜回大牢而被捕，界诸婴为其求情并被迫封印了七海伶的星辰力。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 十八年来，满月记恨着蒋家害她家破人亡，如今借公关工作令基俊回港。基俊认出满月遂刻意试探，满月为让基俊放下戒心，不惜以身犯险，制造车祸助他脱险。苦肉计成功令满月取得哲贤和基俊的信任，哲贤更命满月筹办基俊的婚礼；而满月则暗中将朱柏中安插在蒋家，成为基俊的司机。成风想向满月探问蒋家消息，满月反从成风口中得知，蒋家即将与「王卓集团」主席卓昊天的孙女卓慧云联婚。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: 邪完再邪
programme.desc: 女鬼刘阿翠钟情以前邻居马素，欲与其结合，央求父亲携同金银珠宝向马提亲，撮合一段人鬼姻缘，马素年青憨直，不愿与鬼为伍，坚决拒绝，实则彼暗恋已有男友之邻居红卜卜，阿翠洞悉其情，决定伺机行动。

programme.title: 欲焰狂流
programme.desc: 故事描述饰花花公子的乔庄与好友杨帆，同时爱上胡燕妮，但杨成人之美。但乔因生殖力弱，故当胡怀孕时，就怀疑妻与杨有染...

programme.title: 神通术与小霸王
programme.desc: 三国时代，道士于吉凭藉精妙的道术医好无数病人，深受百姓爱戴。不料，「小霸王」孙策认为于吉妖言惑众，遂下令把他斩首。怎料于吉练成道术，被斩后，他的元神脱体飞出并向孙策报复。

programme.title: 王昭君
programme.desc: 王昭君拒绝贿赂画师，于是一直被画师画丑致未被皇帝看上。但皇帝初遇昭君后，惊为天人，即选中她。画师被逐后，为报复而设计将昭君与匈奴可汗和亲。皇帝因拒绝婚事即引来两国争战，以致王昭君最后为了平息战乱不得不牺牲自己。

programme.title: 龙门金剑
programme.desc: 白玉龙找寻失踪的父亲白震东，与丐帮帮主安乐天的义女魏金凤日久生情，终于在金剑庄成婚。婚后不久，玉龙竟被「龙门宫」的人捉去。白父曾和其宫主龙仙子结婚，诞下玉龙，现龙七姑迫玉龙遵守宫规和月兰结婚！玉龙逃回金剑庄，龙仙子至，母子相认，仙子召集门人，决意将宫规废除！

programme.title: 仙女下凡
programme.desc: 生活在天宫的仙女七妹向往凡间的生活，一夜她偷驾祥云下凡到了香港，人生路不熟的仙女差点上了不法分子的当，幸得董自立所救。董原为孤儿院主持人，因经济拮据，被迫将院址押给许财发；期限到的时候；又被勒令搬家。另一方面，七妹屡次施法助董，却被指是鬼魂......

programme.title: 倚天屠龙记大结局
programme.desc: 剧情主线在于张无忌、周芷若与赵明的三角恋，以及倚天剑屠龙刀秘密的最后答案。

programme.title: 夕阳恋人
programme.desc: 这是日本导演上梅次文艺片的经典。故事描述井莉饰的车衣女工与秦沛饰的修车工，在夕阳萌生感情，后女因识破男的太子爷身份，深感受骗...

programme.title: 刺马
programme.desc: 张汶祥、黄纵与马新贻三人是结拜兄弟，可惜因为马新贻为达目的贪赃枉法，更倾慕黄纵的妻子，导致三人关系破裂，最终更血腥收场。

programme.title: 多咀街
programme.desc: 「多咀街」是一条丁字形的热闹街道，住客大多是各行各业的小市民。他们对社会所发生的大小事情喜欢谈论，七嘴八舌，招惹是非；三言两语，道出人情冷暖，有道是：言为心声。不管是粤剧艺员、暴发户、黑社会人物或司机，他们说的话是嬉笑怒骂或冷嘲热讽也好，都足以反映出现实社会人情百态之一斑。

programme.title: 小英雄
programme.desc: 主角小杂种由隐士抚养并授以武术；一天，隐士嘱他下山访寻父母。途中，他体验到人情冷暖，先与女乞丐小乙惺惺相惜，建立「同是天涯沦落人」的友 谊，亦与邑绅之子顾英豪结怨。最后，他终于从妓院鸨母口中得知自己的身世，原来其生母本在顾家为婢，被老爷引诱成奸后，又遭虐待致死...

programme.title: 新陈三五娘
programme.desc: 泉州才子陈伯卿，邂逅潮州第一美人黄碧琚，心生倾慕；后伯卿得知两人幼时曾定亲，于是隐瞒身份，卖身黄府，作陪读书僮，以接近碧琚。陕西巡抚之子林大雄，垂涎碧琚美色，强自下聘，欲娶之为妻；碧琚父贪财怕势，不理家人反对，收下林家聘礼。伯卿得知碧琚已有婚配，刺激过度，一病不起...

programme.title: 大杀手
programme.desc: 结义兄弟妹三人同闯江湖情意深，龙兄加入了缉私队，虎弟率直被人利用，小妹夹在中间做人难。

programme.title: 女秀才
programme.desc: 闻蜚蛾自幼女扮男装从父习武，后更考得秀才功名，堪称文武全才。同窗好友杜子中与魏撰之虽与蜚蛾日夕相对，均不知其是女儿身。闻母见女儿年纪不小，不该再扮男装，劝蜚蛾选撰之或子中为夫婿。不料蜚娥与二人情谊相同，一时无法抉择，遂决定由天定夺，怎知阴差阳错，选婿之箭落于撰之手中。蜚娥后悔不已，才知自己意属子中...

programme.title: 锦衣卫
programme.desc: 明朝时，英宗昏庸无能，大权落入刘永饰的宦官之手，他利用锦衣卫诛杀异己；然梁家仁饰的锦衣卫统领却义释忠良。其父在宦官胁迫下被迫追杀亲子...

programme.title: 裸血
programme.desc: 凌波的丈夫高远及其友王侠，均与肚皮舞女郎孟莉有染，孟藉此勒索二人；后孟被杀，高成嫌疑犯，另孟之兄翟诺，亦向高勒索；而凌在家，也接见了谷峰，他声言有为高洗罪的证据，但要索钱；王妻李香君借贷给凌... 究竟谁是杀孟真凶？

programme.title: 野姑娘
programme.desc: 金小芳是一位活泼且无畏的乡村少女，面对恶霸从不退缩，总是勇敢反抗。当她揭露了唐家大少爷的阴谋后，立刻引来他的狠毒报复。幸好，她心仪的男子大海及时挺身而出相救。两人能否携手对抗险恶命运，改写结局？

programme.title: 天下第一拳
programme.desc: 故事描述，顾文宗饰的老拳师突遭百武馆馆徒袭击，幸汪萍饰的女儿及罗烈饰的弟子救驾；顾自知年迈力衰，不足为罗师，亦恐邪派夺全国锦标，遂面谕罗改投尚武馆习艺，以夺魁为期许。罗途遇王金凤饰的卖唱女遭调戏，王获救后欲以身相许，罗心中有汪遂拒王；后罗屡遭百武馆徒滋扰，更为外援日本浪人所伤...

programme.title: 愤怒青年
programme.desc: 沈昌生性沉郁，与父亲缺乏沟通，被人利用，误入歧途。昌逃不过暴力的魔爪和色情的引诱，竟然出卖父亲，让父亲惨死。昌悲悔交加，独闯飞仔巢，逐一将之击毙，自已也进入疯狂状态。

programme.title: 埋伏
programme.desc: 捕快万超凡与父亲遭人诬陷，背负抢劫珠宝的罪名，沦为逃亡的通缉犯。身陷绝境，万超凡誓要寻回失落的珠宝，洗脱万家的冤屈。然而，他并非唯一寻宝之人......

programme.title: 青春鼓王
programme.desc: 船员孙志强巧合成为「火花大乐队」的鼓手，他因急于成名，答应帮助音乐杂志出版人李源明接近乐队经理黄丽真，以换取源明的力捧。终于，志强得偿所愿，一炮而红，源明却逼他实践诺言，与丽真断绝来往。志强受到极大打击，唯有忍痛离开乐队与丽真...

programme.title: 大旗英雄传
programme.desc: 铁中棠乃大旗门掌门云翼之义子，因门派宝藏之秘密而遭宿敌司徒笑追杀。为解开身世与宝藏之谜，他远赴长春岛寻访「日后」，却发现她早已离世。岂料在岛上意外遇见大旗门真正的创派掌门「夜帝」，而夜帝亦亲口揭露，自己正是铁中棠的生父。

programme.title: 阿牛出狱记
programme.desc: 续集中阿牛不幸的遭遇更令人心痛，当中不少更是笑中有泪的经历。阿牛出狱后，再遇爱人阿花，可惜她已嫁为人妻；另一方面，戆直的阿牛仍不断被狡猾的周大叔欺骗...

programme.title: 四骑士
programme.desc: 韩战结束之后的汉城，出现了近代四骑士。他们包括拳术教官金义、搏击教练冯侠、爆破专家高英寒及枪械专家李维诗。四人于兵燹之中幸存，不约而同以寻欢作乐作为生活方式。以霍克、雷泰、银花为首的贩毒组织，欲收买退役美国军曹偷运毒品回国，军曹最后不欲冒险，被霍克手下爪牙杀死。冯侠被嫁祸成杀人嫌疑犯，金义、高英寒、李维诗为救朋友，同心协力与罪恶组织展开多场生死搏斗...

programme.title: 七仙女
programme.desc: 故事描述少年董永卖身传员外家，为奴以埋父骨；其孝心感动了七仙女，便幻成村姑，在六位仙姐下凡暗助下，为董缩减偿还工作日，回复自由后，二人回董故家，但愉快的凡间生活能持续多久呢？

programme.title: 天涯明月刀
programme.desc: 电影讲述傅红雪为了应付势力庞大的阴谋家公子羽，除了力敌对方的爪牙，亦要智破对方的诡计。凭藉出色的武打设计、华丽的布景、唯美的拍摄技巧及强劲的演员阵容，《天涯明月刀》在武侠电影的历史上创下高锋。

programme.title: 相思河畔
programme.desc: 富商之子冯琪伟恋上歌女方碧玉，碧玉身世凄凉，常受流氓头子林老二及李老三压榨勒索，幸得琪伟相助并娶之为妻。婚后二人育一子，惜李老三再度敲诈，最终琪伟为爱妻讨回公道而与李老三同归于尽...
