programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Banner
programme.desc: The banner for Revs' Air show has disappeared. Where can it be ? Could someone be trying to spoil Revs' show? Noddy investigates.

programme.title: The Case Of The Fallen Star
programme.desc: When the brightest star in the sky falls, Noddy has to find it and work out how to get it back into its place in the sky before its light goes out forever. Will he manage in time for the fairies Sparkle party ?

programme.title: The Case Of The Annoying Butterflies
programme.desc: A strange new kind of butterfly is pestering the toys in Toyland - just when the Queen organises a butterfly ball. Noddy has to find out what's going on fast !

programme.title: Why Elephant Has A Trunk
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Elephant had no nose. He couldn't swat away the flies, or scrub his belly… he couldn't even blow his nose. Then one day snappy Crocodile snapped! Crocodile pulled and he pulled and he pulled… until Ker-doing!!! Crocodile let go and Elephant's nose was all long and wiggly! And that's why Elephant has a trunk. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Snake Has No Legs
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Snake did have legs… hundreds and hundreds of them. But poor old Snake had no eyes, not a single eye on his head. Then on the day of the great Tinga Tinga Festival of Colours Snake quite literally bumped into Millipede who was stuck in a hole. They decided to swap eyes and legs just for one day. So that Snake could see all the wonderful colours and Millipede could run all over Tinga Tinga.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Spring Lamb
programme.desc: Julian's preparing for "spring has sprung", the Greendale school play, when pat gets a special delivery call. It's a yeti costume for Bill. When Pat is diverted into the countryside by PC Selby, he spots one of Alf's missing sheep - and she's about to have a lamb! Alf can't get there as his quad bike is being fixed, so Pat offers to take the sheep in his van. But the sheep is reluctant to move. Meanwhile, Bill is worried that his costume won't turn up and he'll let his classmates down.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Painted Sheep
programme.desc: Pat has got to deliver special cans of blue dye for Alf to mark up his cheeky runaway sheep. That way, when they get out, he can work out which sheep belong to him! Meanwhile, the kids are having a special delivery service day of their own as Ben gives them a tour of the Sorting Office.

programme.title: Flash The Marshall
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is going to ban Flash from Silver hatch unless he learns how to do something useful. Can Flash learn how to be a good marshal in time?

programme.title: Hellie's A Winner
programme.desc: Hellie wants to be able to race like the cars. When he does join in he is accused of cheating. Hellie is upset and the cars annoyed… will they be able to make up before something disastrous happens?

programme.title: Dodgems
programme.desc: Marsha decides to be a mechanic but wears Big Chris out with her endless questions. Disaster strikes when Chris dozes off and doesn't listen to her properly…

programme.title: Tall Story Roary
programme.desc: The loudspeaker system is not working at Silver Hatch. How will Roary be stopped from performing a dangerous stunt on the track?

programme.title: The Case Of The Knocked Down Fences
programme.desc: While Hoof is about to do his obstacle course, he finds all the fences knocked down. He blames Bling, who was jealous of the lucky wings he wears on his hoofs, but Bling assures she's got nothing to do with it ! Noddy investigates to settle their argument.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unfinished Building
programme.desc: Strange accidents keep happening on the building site. Clockwork Mouse is convinced that someone is trying to stop them finishing the building. Noddy investigates and finds out things aren't quite as they seem...

programme.title: The Case Of The Damaged Magic Box
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is doing a magic show but she discovers her magic box is broken. Noddy investigates: Who broke the magic box? He needs to find out soon so that Pat Pat's show can take place.

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Pirates
programme.desc: Armed with a brand new sat-nav from Fuse, the Pirates head off on The Pirate Challenge, sailing all around Toyland. But when they fail to arrive at their first stop in Toy Green, Noddy investigates what's happened. He must set the Pirates back on course to complete the challenge by the end of the day.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Crash Course
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.title: Furious Fun
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders have a "Dragon Day" to show their skills to a young fan, but Aggro skips it to hang out with her new fun -- but reckless -- friends.

programme.title: Rodney the Hero / Club Shed
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Missing Marcus / The Baby-Glitter’s Club
programme.desc: When Marcus leaves for sleep-away camp, Phoebe discovers that being a "family fairy" means helping everyone in your assigned family, not just the children. / When Tracy hires Cassie to babysit Nicholas, and Eden asks Athena and Phoebe to lend a helping hand, Cassie and the Dews must find a way to get Nicholas to bed without his missing and beloved penguin stuffy.

programme.title: The Case Of The Knocked Down Fences
programme.desc: While Hoof is about to do his obstacle course, he finds all the fences knocked down. He blames Bling, who was jealous of the lucky wings he wears on his hoofs, but Bling assures she's got nothing to do with it ! Noddy investigates to settle their argument.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unfinished Building
programme.desc: Strange accidents keep happening on the building site. Clockwork Mouse is convinced that someone is trying to stop them finishing the building. Noddy investigates and finds out things aren't quite as they seem...

programme.title: The Case Of The Damaged Magic Box
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is doing a magic show but she discovers her magic box is broken. Noddy investigates: Who broke the magic box? He needs to find out soon so that Pat Pat's show can take place.

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Pirates
programme.desc: Armed with a brand new sat-nav from Fuse, the Pirates head off on The Pirate Challenge, sailing all around Toyland. But when they fail to arrive at their first stop in Toy Green, Noddy investigates what's happened. He must set the Pirates back on course to complete the challenge by the end of the day.

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Little Sisters / Tricky Treasure
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Crabby / Spe-shell
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Board Silly / Sing for the Fences
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Fast Frank’s Fixit / Tail-Kwondo
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail.

programme.title: Garby
programme.desc: Just as Ty Rux welcomes Garby, a loud and smelly Stegarbasaurus, to the crater, Revvit disappears and the gang embarks on a dangerous rescue mission.

programme.title: Palentine's Day
programme.desc: The PALs make plans for the Valentine's Day dance, then pivot to scare off a group of raiders who've come to rob the headmaster's vault.

programme.title: Gorgey Girl / A Gran Adventure
programme.desc: Eep has the first pen pal in Gulp Gorge/Gran sends Ugga and Eep on the first treasure hunt when she decides to pass on her inheritance

programme.title: 127 Owwws / 28 Fleas Later
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as "quicktogramming"/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a "super bug"

programme.title: Imperfect Harmony
programme.desc: The Dragon Riders discover a lush island that turns out to be the home of the Deathsong, a massive dragon that threatens to trap them forever.

programme.title: When Darkness Falls
programme.desc: On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.

programme.title: The Last Guardian
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: A Thread In The Dark
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Cupcake Tree
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: The Fairy Festival!
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: The Boss Babysitter
programme.desc: Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter!

programme.title: Into the Belly of the Den of the House of the Nest of Cats
programme.desc: Mom tries to help Tim get over his fear of the neighborhood crazy-cat-lady

programme.title: Spirit Day
programme.desc: Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Flustering Mindless Woe of the Flushable Memory Wipes
programme.desc: After being made fun of for sitting in chocolate pudding, George and Harold go into hiding only to come back to find that everybody has forgotten who they are

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Soggy Salvation of the Swirling Sweatnami
programme.desc: Tired of mean Mr. Krupp, the boys go back in time to prevent him from becoming a bully, but discover that their plan has backfired when they return to the present

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Sickening Fumes of Smartsy Fartsy
programme.desc: In order to retrieve Mr. Krupp’s locked up rule book, George and Harold use an invention that ends up turning against them

programme.title: Ghost Town Grand Prix
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: The Owl Job
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: The Celestial Vault
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Not Lout
programme.desc: When Snotlout screws up a mission, he must learn to be a leader and earn the trust of the other riders.

programme.title: Saving Shattermaster
programme.desc: When Mala and the Defenders of the Wing find a mysterious stranger who looks suspiciously like Dagur, Hiccup and Heather go to investigate.

programme.title: Dire Straits
programme.desc: Viggo gets angry at the dragon riders continually interfering with his business and uses a deep sea dragon, the Submaripper, to control Berk's trade.

programme.title: So I'm Dating A Sorceress
programme.desc: Jim and his friends decide to take a night off for a double date, only to discover an uninvited fifth wheel.

programme.title: She Who Walks In The Shadows
programme.desc: When Jim discovers Claire’s sickness is much different than an average cold, they must traverse into the dangerous Shadow Realm to save her life.

programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: The Trollhunters are paused from action when their parents stage an intervention to get answers from the kids.

programme.title: Apok-ta-pokalypse Now Part 1
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Apok-ta-pokalypse Now Part 2
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: A Cause for The Paws
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.title: Mother's Day
programme.desc: The arrival of Tronos - a bounty hunter with the power to control electricity - sparks an investigation by Area 49-B that threatens to expose the Royals’ alien identities. Meanwhile, Mother watches as the Royals struggle to work together to deal with this new threat.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: When Colonel Kubritz issues a medical quarantine that locks down the high school, Aja and Krel must avoid capture with help from their friends. Meanwhile Vex, Zadra, and Stuart have a run-in with a familiar face.

programme.title: There's Something About Gwen (of Gorbon)
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date- where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: A Tale Of Two Turbos / The Escargot Affair
programme.desc: Turbo is surprised to learn that somebody in town is pretending to be him and must find the imposter before they can cause more trouble. // Turbo is invited to a fancy dinner party in his honor but learns that he is actually on the menu, so it's up to the crew to save him.

programme.title: Surf N Turf / Hardcase Returns
programme.desc: The snails' relaxing day at the beach is threatened when the sewer surfing roaches challenge them to a surfing contest. // Hardcase returns and threatens to take revenge on, so the crew becomes his bodyguards and takes the job a little too seriously.

programme.title: Lake Ball Pit / The Poppy Corn Festival
programme.desc: Cannonball! Archibald becomes a lifeguard at Lake Ball Pit. When Loy can't get along with a rival, Archibald gets a lesson in the art of sarcasm.

programme.title: The Case Of The Stuck Toys
programme.desc: When Noddy arrives at Toy Green Station, he finds some toys stuck to the ground: someone has spread some glue all over the station platform! Why would someone do that? Noddy investigates.

programme.title: The Case Of The Untidy Pirates
programme.desc: It's Tidy Toyland Day and Noddy wants to win the Tidy Toyland Trophy. Unfortunately he's also invited the untidy Pirates round to play! Noddy has to figure out how he can play with the Pirates and win the Tidy Toyland Trophy.

programme.title: The Case Of The Ruined Race
programme.desc: It's the Brickabuild Sports & Fun Day and Clockwork Mouse tells Carlton she doesn't want ANY accidents. But when the Egg & Spoon Race comes to a grinding halt, Noddy has to find out who is trying to ruin the race.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Investigation Kit
programme.desc: It's the Royal Egg Hunt and Noddy's investigation kit goes missing. With Bumpy and Revs, Noddy soon finds some of his things, but not his binoculars. Someone must be using them, but what for? Noddy needs to find out in time before the Egg Hunt starts.

programme.title: Why Hippo Has No Hair
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hippo did have hair… lots of hair! She was always harumphingly hot. Then one hot night while Hippo was sleeping a spark from the fire caught the end of her hairy tail! Hippo was on fire! She ran through the bush until SPLOSH! Hippo jumped in the waterhole. And from that day on Hippo stayed in the cool waters without a single hair on her hide. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Tortoise Has A Broken Shell
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tortoise's shell was all shiny and smooth. One day Tortoise discovered the birds were having a Feast in the Heavens and he tricked the Birds into making him a pair of wings. Greedy Tortoise raced the birds beyond the clouds and scoffed the whole feastt! When the Birds found out Tortoise had to jump off a cloud until BOOF!!! He landed on his shiny shell.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Eco Igloo
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is spearheading a recycling initiative "A Greener Greendale" but has been overwhelmed by donations of plastic bottles and compost. Meanwhile, Pat picks up today's special delivery - blocks of ice to make an igloo at the school for their North Pole project. Pat and Ajay struggle to get the slippery blocks into PAT2, then Pat and Jess must endure a journey with the air-con on full blast to keep the blocks frozen. Despite this, the ice starts to melt on the way to the Schoolhouse.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Reckless Rollers
programme.desc: Pat is delivering some new car wash rollers to Ted, but the locks on his van doors are faulty. As Pat negotiates an obstruction in the road, the van doors fly open and the rollers fly into a field of startled sheep! Integrating them into their flock, the sheep make off with them, and Pat and Jess take chase, creating more chaos on the roads. Meanwhile, PC Selby has arrived at the car wash, eager to get the panda car cleaned for his date with Dr Gilbertson.

programme.title: Car Boot Sale
programme.desc: Big Chris has a clear out and takes all his old junk up to Farmer Green's car boot sale but misses the clutter in Rusty. How will he get everything back?

programme.title: Hot Stuff
programme.desc: Big Chris takes the cars to the beach to relax in the heat but he is so busy dealing with the cars he forgets to drink his water. But hang on, who else has drunk it…

programme.title: Law And Order
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with the cars running amok on his track and summons Bill and Nick to restore order to the track. But might our overzealous policeman overstep the mark?

programme.title: Flash's Tea Party
programme.desc: Flash invites everyone to a tea party, thinking they bring the food with them. Are there going to be a lot of hungry bunnies at Silver hatch?

programme.title: The Case Of The Torn-Out Pages
programme.desc: Someone's ripped out the final pages of Queen Sparklewings Fairytale book! Who could it be ? Noddy needs to find out fast and restore the pages to the book or the Queen's special fairytale storytelling will be cancelled.

programme.title: The Case Of The Bird That Can't Fly
programme.desc: Noddy finds a bird in Pat-Pat's Treehouse that doesn't seem to be able to fly. He decides to investigate: how can they help the bird to fly? Noddy finds out that the bird can fly - it just doesn't want to. But why ?

programme.title: The Case Of The Clockwork Mouse Mystery
programme.desc: Everyone in Toyland is excited about the first ever Winter Light Festival - except its organiser, Clockwork Mouse who is moving at super fast speed. Noddy investigates why she's acting so strangely. He works out that she's been trying to move at triple speed to get everything sorted in time. Noddy helps her realise that she doesn't have to do all the festival preparations on her own. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Smartysaurus
programme.desc: For the Night of the Stars, Noddy invites all his friends at home to look at the stars through his telescope. Smartysaurus will bring a map of the stars so everyone can spot them. But when the party starts, Smartysaurus hasn't arrived. Noddy investigates and finds out his big friend couldn't fit through his small front door so she'd shrunk herself! Noddy has to help Smartysaurus get back to her proper size and find a way for everyone to enjoy the Night of the Stars together. Good job, Noddy.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Grumblegard, Part 1
programme.desc: While the others care for baby dragons at the roost, Dak, Winger, Burple and Aggro come face-to-face with a grumpy old dragon on a dangerous island.

programme.title: Grumblegard, Part 2
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders plan to team up with the Slinkwings when an angry Grumblegard threatens Huttsgalor. But their old enemies may be up to new tricks.

programme.title: It Takes a Zenko / What a Racket
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Hammy in the House / To Go Lunch
programme.desc: When Eden finds an "injured" Hammy out of his cage and helps him recuperate in her own home, she finds it harder and harder to get her "new guest" to return to his own home. / When Marcus forgets his lunch at home, Phoebe and the Dews must find a way to deliver him his lunch during his class's field trip to the park, but when they lose his lunch they must work to create a new and nutritious alternative.

programme.title: LaLiga 2025/26: Getafe vs Barcelona (Live)
programme.desc: Extensive coverage from every round of the Spanish LaLiga, Spain's top division of football with the World's biggest teams.

programme.title: 怪谈
programme.desc: 在迷雾村，为人养子的文杰反复梦见同一个噩梦。为了解开身世之谜，他卷入连串神秘的失踪案件中。随着更多村民相继离奇死去，村民更深信不疑千年来的井龙王诅咒。于是，文杰与保安队长联手探寻真相，揭开反派阴谋，最终拯救被危害的无辜村民.

programme.title: 种鬼
programme.desc: 故事描述，计程车司机周通(高飞饰)之妻艾莲(玄智慧饰)红杏出墙，搭上赌场常客方明(徐少强饰)。一日，艾与方争执后独自离去，却被流氓挟往荒屋施暴，艾极力反抗，终堕楼惨死。周受一股神秘力量引导，发现艾尸首，蒙眬间，闻鬼语遣其往找巫师设法报仇。自始怪事接连发生，所有与艾之死有关的人均遭鬼怪缠扰...

programme.title: 冥婚
programme.desc: 摄影师陈志成长年被一名「红衣女子」纠缠，导致多位亲人惨死；甚至连自己心仪的女孩思桐亦难逃恶运。志成欲寻找思桐惨死的真相，却揭发关于一场「冥婚」的秘密...

programme.title: 叱咤风云
programme.desc: 车王李一飞不甘于过气的事实，为了争一口气证明自己，导致同队女车手吕莉莉发生意外，他所属的车队因此陷入倒闭危机。直至一名毫无赛道经验的虚拟赛车冠军选手加入车队，他的真实赛车表现竟超出预料。三人能否一起为车队重夺曾经拥有的辉煌与光荣？

programme.title: 零号追杀
programme.desc: 退出江湖的特工华叔，在老街以开古董店为生。一天，老街遭当地青龙帮强拆时，华叔隐藏的身份被暴露，并受到阿杰为首的神秘组织追杀，由此展开了一场双雄对决!

programme.title: 鹿鼎记 II
programme.desc: 「神龙教」教主龙儿奉命协助吴三桂推翻康熙皇帝，却反遭吴三桂陷害，幸得韦小宝相救才得以保命。于是龙儿以身相许，并把绝世武功传于韦小宝以对付吴三桂。最后，韦小宝更意外地从四十二章经中得知满清龙脉的秘密宝藏。

programme.title: 霍家拳之精武英雄
programme.desc: 陈真在日本流学时，发现多名中国学生失踪，意外揭发黑龙会的阴谋。原来，黑龙会研发新药以增强日本军在战争中的体能，并捉拿中国学生做实验。于是，陈真誓要瓦解黑龙会，并将其实验密室捣毁。

programme.title: 师兄撞鬼
programme.desc: 该片描述董骠调查制造毒品案，却惨死在毒贩枪下。董骠化做鬼魂回警察局，借警员周星驰之手查清杀己的凶手。冯淬帆和周星驰在茅山老祖的指导下利用灵药合力斗败邪恶法师，枪毙邓公子，为董骠报了仇，使他能安心上天堂。

programme.title: 卧虎藏龙
programme.desc: 剑侠李慕白将绝世宝剑「青冥剑」托付王爷府保管，岂料竟遭玉娇龙盗去。这位出身高贵却武艺超凡的玉娇龙，师从邪道「碧眼狐狸」。李慕白惜其才华，屡次欲导其向善而未果，二人终究难逃命运纠缠，注定共赴悲剧。

programme.title: 歼毒先锋
programme.desc: 退役军人吴巍和卧底刑警高天明带领特别行动小组勇闯近曼谷的孤岛，从暴徒手中救出人质。但在完成任务并准备离岛之际，吴巍发现自己的女儿被对方胁持。为救女儿及将犯罪分子绳之以法，吴巍和高天明重回危险境地，与暴徒进行了惨烈的对决。

programme.title: 油鬼子
programme.desc: 故事描述沈元（李修贤）亡父与林亚峇（谷峰）为生死之交。沈父临终前，曾在林之背上刺有神秘图案，而此图实是一道有特殊功能的符。后林为保护女儿中月（陈萍）而杀人，被判死刑；林被处死前，着沈把图案描下，以备不时之须。沈按图文指示，化身成威力无穷的油鬼子，帮助过不少人，亦铲除不少坏人，但最终却陷入疯狂状态。

programme.title: 爱的世界
programme.desc: 李子良丧妻后，与两个儿子相依为命。妻子的巨额医药费令子良经济十分拮据，受同事教唆往马场孤注一掷，迫得向高利贷借款，从此子良债台高筑，疲于奔命，没有时间与儿子沟通，父子疏离。与此同时高利贷不断登门恐吓，骚扰儿子，最终弄至悲剧发生...

programme.title: 三十处男
programme.desc: 设计师赵宇庭被批算三十岁前结婚，会被妻子克死，赵父遂严禁赵宇庭结交异性。但限期将届，他急不及待觅对象。荔玲与母亲同为死人化妆师，为了交男友改为新娘化妆，此时她认识了赵宇庭...

programme.title: 赤脚小子
programme.desc: 穷乡青年关丰曜，终日赤着双脚，以背人过河为活。关父临终前，嘱其出城投靠段青云；段骤见故人之子，留下关在布店当小工。关与私塾女教师华小莲交心，却遭莲父白眼；关为求出人头地，竟往投靠土霸喀和布，结果连累莲父与段相继被喀暗算身亡。关得知真相，惜为时已晚，追悔莫及，决与喀拼过死活...

programme.title: Subaru Brz
programme.desc: Mike buys his newest ever car to create a bespoke Scooby BRZ STI. But hopes of a profit are hit with a hefty bill for the turbo and a new exhaust.

programme.title: Missing In Action
programme.desc: When a fellow miner vanishes, Ken and Shawn interrupt their operations to join the search and rescue. Vern finally unleashes on the Bering Sea.

programme.title: Moving The Monster
programme.desc: Fallers grapple with gnarly timber, but Jared's company and first $100k royalty payment are in jeopardy if he can't wrestle a 140-ton beast uphill.

programme.title: Winter's Fortune: Gold Moves
programme.desc: Tony Beets sets his sights on a $3.5-million monster dozer. Dave Turin hunts for a claim with his new Mad Max prospecting machine.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: A driver in a stolen vehicle leads a rookie cop on an action-packed pursuit in Florida. In Illinois, cops chase down a convicted murderer.

programme.desc: For most people, Shaolin kung fu takes years to master -- Ed has just a few days to learn to control his Qi, or vital force, before fighting a martial arts master.

programme.desc: Ant takes a gamble on a mysterious Mark1 Capri. And Ant's girlfriend Renee Zellweger surprises him with a cool addition for the home.

programme.title: Its Not Life Or Death - Yet
programme.desc: Mickey fires one of the team's only experienced members before enlisting a local guide to lead them through a treacherous desert.

programme.title: Behind The Myth
programme.desc: Was the exotic dancer Mata Hari a German spy? Two climbers vanish into legend atop Mount Everest. A ghost's testimony is used to convict a murderer.

programme.title: Zalud House
programme.desc: The crew investigates the Zalud House in California, which contains a severely haunted object.

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 长风渡
programme.desc: 自小受尽磨砺的徉州城布商之女柳玉茹与当地著名纨绔顾九思阴差阳错结为夫妻, 性格迥异的两人在错位婚姻里, 从相互抵触到相互扶持, 相互治愈。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 试真D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 试真D & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 教煮争霸
programme.desc: 当「鼎爷」李家鼎、「三姐」萧秀香刚柔相遇，意味着一场全新的厨房大战蓄势待发！每集由嘉宾为鼎爷与三姐出题，当中包括著名厨师、识食艺人等，务求让两人以相同食材或主题，烹调出各具风格的菜式，比试同时分享煮食心得。

programme.title: Holistic Way及京都念慈庵呈献: 正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 试真D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 美食新闻报道
programme.desc: 香港汇聚环球美食，特色佳肴、贴地料理受到识饮识食之人的密切关注！黄婉曼、蔡雪莹、倪嘉雯、黄嘉雯、廖慧仪、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新饮食情报与优惠，深入了解滋味背后的故事。

programme.title: 最强生命线
programme.desc: 都市人生活节奏紧张，压力又大，身体易出毛病，《最强生命线》为你解构健康之道。每集都会邀请医学专家讲解各种疾病的成因，还有物理治疗师，运动治疗师教做适当的运动。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导& 世界观 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Ruben Neves, Joao Moutinho, Jose Sa. Wolverhampton Wanderers have a long history of Portuguese players shining in the Old Gold at Molineux. Another player looking to add his name to that list is Rodrigo Gomes. This week, Gomes is joined by Shaun Wright-Phillips to discuss his journey from the Braga academy to joining Wolves in 2024. The pair also take an in-depth look at his play this season, and head to the training pitch to recreate some iconic Wolves goals.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Diego Gómez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gómez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gómez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: Let Justice Be done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: The Grass is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Gym / The Crew Puts On A Construction Show
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble & Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show. But when the beam is too high for Lily, it's up to the pups to save the day.//When a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!

programme.title: The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whirly Playground
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: Pups Save the Bunnies / Puptacular
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. // Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: Pups Save the Bay / Pups Save a Goodway
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water to save the animals in Adventure Bay. // When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to find a clever way to bring it back!

programme.title: I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: Mole
programme.desc: Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Dam / The Crew Builds A Squirrel-Proof Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town. // Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programme.title: The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: Blaze and the Magic Genie
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are driving through the desert when they meet a magical Genie who loves to grant wishes! But when the Genie loses the jewels that give him his powers, Blaze and AJ go on a quest to get them back!

programme.title: Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Campfire Stories
programme.desc: It's a campout under the stars! Blaze, AJ, Starla, Crusher, and Pickle are gathered around the campfire to tell the most amazing stories they can make up! And the best part? Whoever tells the best story wins the last marshmallow!

programme.title: Superwheels!
programme.desc: Blaze super powers transforming him into... SUPER BLAZE!! And just in time; trouble Bots from outer space land in Axle City and start making a huge mess!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasure
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: Pups Save Queen Cluck-Cluck / Pups Save a Desert Flounder
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway dreams she's travelled to the mysterious Cluck Cluck Island-a very strange land where Chickaletta is royalty! // Travelling Travis's balloon gets caught on the Flounder, Travis and Cap'n Turbot wind up all the way out into the desert.

programme.title: Pups Save a Trash-Dinger / Pups Save the Royal Armor
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's trash-compacting truck is messing up the beach. It's up to Rocky's new Re-Use It Truck to help save a rescue! // Gift for the Princess been scattered all over town. It's up to Rocky's Re-Use It Truck to put her gifts back together!

programme.title: Side-Swiped / Quest for the Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: The Cloud Kingdom
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story. Later George wakes up again, so Peppa has to make up another story.

programme.title: Lost Keys
programme.desc: After a family trip to a mountain beauty spot, Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a very deep drain.

programme.title: George's New Dinosaur
programme.desc: When his favorite toy dinosaur loses its tail, George visits Mr Fox's Shop to find a new one.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Train to the Rescue
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit's train has broken down, so Grandpa Pig lends her his toy train, Trudy.

programme.title: Peppa and George's Garden
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig pops round with some seeds for Peppa and George. Daddy Pig helps out by being a scarecrow.

programme.title: The Flying Vet
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster is rushed off her feet when nearly all the animals need her help on the same day.

programme.title: Kylie Kangeroo
programme.desc: Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: Captain Daddy Dog
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and he's bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit's Dinosaur Park
programme.desc: To celebrate Freddy Fox's birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park. With Grampy Rabbit as their leader, they follow dinosaur footprints to find Freddy's birthday treat.

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Barbabright Has a Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Cluc Croc / One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: Epic Sail
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island! Blaze and his crew must find the missing pieces of their ship so they can sail home.

programme.title: The Team Truck Challenge
programme.desc: It's the day of the Team Truck Challenge, a race where all the trucks get to compete in teams of two! But when Crusher chooses a new partner instead of Pickle, his disappointed sidekick teams up with Blaze to prove his mettle.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: Pups Save a Waiter-Bot / Pups Stop a Pie-Clone
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's high tech waiter robot helps around the cafe, but it can't stop cleaning! It's up to the Pups to clean up the mess all over town! // Mayor Humdinger creates a cyclone of delicious pies! The Pups must stop it before the town is covered.

programme.title: Pups Save the Big Bad Bird Crew / Pups Save a Soapbox Derby
programme.desc: Myrna the Mynah bird leads her feathered friends astray and it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue the wayward flock. // Adventure Bay is holding a kids only soapbox derby race when a mysterious newcomer named ''Hum-Kid'' shows up and breaks the rules!

programme.title: Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Adventures In Plantsitting / Andrea the Alebrije
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: Rainforest Race / Bok Bok Birthday
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: Doctor Hamster's Big Present
programme.desc: Peppa and her family take Goldie the Fish to Doctor Hamster for her check-up. Dr Hamster wishes she could exercise more, so Grampy Rabbit decides to build something to help...

programme.title: Butterflies
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster comes to school to talk about butterflies. The children paint caterpillars, make butterfly wings and even dance the life cycle of a butterfly.

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit's Jetpack
programme.desc: It's snowing and Grampy Rabbit has built a jetpack. While showing it to Peppa and George, he shoots off into the distance ending up on top of a snowy mountain. Miss Rabbit goes to rescue him, but Grampy Rabbit is the one that rescues them all.

programme.title: Detective Potato
programme.desc: Peppa and George are watching Detective Potato on television. When Daddy loses his car in the car park, Detective Potato appears and saves the day!

programme.title: The Electric Car
programme.desc: Daddy Pig arrives in a new electric car. The family all go for a ride and are surprised when the car talks and sings!

programme.title: Stone Age Granny
programme.desc: Granny and her friends' historical re-enactment society are being cave people today. Peppa and George join in helping to catch Grandpa Pig who is dressed as a woolly mammoth.

programme.title: Space Adventure!
programme.desc: Peppa and George are re-enacting the Apollo Moon Landing with the help of Granny Pig's historical re-enactment society. Grampy Rabbit has lent them his rocket, but no one has told him it's just pretend.

programme.title: Construction Crew to the Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped at the top of a tall, rickety tower, Blaze, Stripes and Starla transform into awesome construction vehicles to build a way down.

programme.title: Pups Save Walinda / Pups Save a Big Bone
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol plan a special celebration for Wally the Walrus. When he doesn't show up, they find he has a special new friend named Walinda! // During Cap'n Turbot's archaeological dig, a rock slide unearths a big dinosaur bone!

programme.title: Pups Save a Wrong-Way Explorer
programme.desc: Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into some crocodiles?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Super Tub
programme.desc: When Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

programme.title: Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.desc: A man hangs on the hood of his car while his ex-girlfriend drives it on the highway. An intoxicated woman flees from airport police on a motorised suitcase; and more.

programme.title: Serial Wedding Crasher
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a 911 call about cold fries leads to an arrest for murder; a fugitive is caught on the toilet; and more!

programme.title: Ryan Poster
programme.desc: After a woman calls 911 to report shooting her boyfriend in self-defence, investigators uncover a pristine crime scene and disturbing behaviour that cast doubt on her story.

programme.title: Matheau Moore
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him-even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Locked Away
programme.desc: During a welfare check, authorities discover a man has been living with the mummified bodies of his family. Pathologists cannot determine if they died naturally or if something nefarious occurred.

programme.title: Killed For The Cash
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: Even In Cuffs I Look Good
programme.desc: A young man is taken into custody for public intoxication, while a woman is arrested for lying to police. In Modesto, a teen is hit with a felony charge for criminal threats of violence.

programme.title: Kids Who Kill - Alyssa Bustamante
programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.
A woman who killed her husband is disowned by her children in court; a teacher who slept with her teenaged students apologises to the victims' families; and more.
An irate plaintiff storms out of her virtual hearing and is charged with contempt; a quadruple murderer sobs uncontrollably at sentencing; a judge breaks down laughing at a defendant's complaints.

programme.title: Ringside Seat
programme.desc: Tulsa homicide delves into a dark world of drugs and prostitution to solve the murder of a man executed in his car in a motel parking lot.

programme.title: Meet Up For Murder
programme.desc: After an immigrant, lured by a woman, is beaten to death, Gwinnett County Police discover that one of the three suspects believes no one will care about him because he's Mexican.

programme.title: Four Shots
programme.desc: A construction worker is killed by a stray bullet during an attempted robbery inside a trailer park, but when investigators follow the trail of the suspects, things are not what they seem.

programme.title: Negligent Midwife Or Responsible Caregiver?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 长风渡
programme.desc: 自小受尽磨砺的徉州城布商之女柳玉茹与当地著名纨绔顾九思阴差阳错结为夫妻, 性格迥异的两人在错位婚姻里, 从相互抵触到相互扶持, 相互治愈。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 综艺玩很大
programme.desc: 综艺天王吴宗宪与超人气主持KID林柏昇联手合作，艺人分成两队挑战各式关卡，节目充满趣味性，更借外景地点的不同，带领观众深入了解各地风土民情。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 全城风暴
programme.desc: 科研人员张子聪与团队共同研发的"风控"系统，暗藏的隐患导致了自然灾害的发生。一场始料未及的台风、雷电、地震等自然灾害的连锁反应，让这座城市瞬间崩塌。父亲张英勇拼死一搏也要守护儿子张子聪和女儿张子然。这场猝不及防的台风让一切尽于灰烬，但爱得以重生。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。
